description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that publishes the ryvencore-qt wheel to TestPyPi and PyPi. The workflow should trigger on tag creation and allow manual dispatch. Use an ubuntu-latest job to check out the repository, set up Python 3.x for x64 architecture, install pypa/build, build a binary wheel and source tarball for ryvencore-qt, and then publish the distribution to both TestPyPI and PyPI using provided API tokens.
